messages.content:
Question: Which decade of publication (e.g., 1980s) has the highest average rating among decades with at least 10 distinct books that have been rated? Return the decade with the highest average rating.

Available databases: bookreview_db, review_database

Available schema:
Database: bookreview_db (postgres)
  Table: books_info — title, subtitle, author, rating_number, features, description, price, store, categories, details, book_id
Database: review_database (sqlite)
  Table: review — rating, title, text, review_time, helpful_vote, verified_purchase, purchase_id

messages.name: query_db
messages.content:
Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_1'] for use in execute_python.
